title: AXValidationRuleOptions
description: Base interface for validation rule options that provides common configuration properties for all validation rules.

types.title: AXValidationRuleOptions

props.name: message
props.description: Custom error message to display when validation fails.

props.name: enabled
props.description: Whether the validation rule is enabled.

props.name: async
props.description: Whether the validation rule should be executed asynchronously.

types.description: Base interface that all validation rule options must extend, providing common configuration properties.
